title: Personal & Corporate Banking | MSME & Agri banking - IDBI Bank
content:
Presently Bank is having various retail term deposit products in its bucket which is well suited to customer requirements and now one more addition in this row by introducing a unique product exclusively customised for customers participating in Bids/Tender/ EMD Process .This Product will exclusively cater to the requirements of individual/ Non individual customers having regular participation in bidding/ tendering/ EMD process. 
All type of customer segment including individual , Non- Individual , HUF , Corporate, Trust , NGO etc are eligible for availing benefit under Tender FD for their regular business & personal requirement . 
Being designed for exclusive purpose tender FD having distinct charactristic which differentiate it from Normal FD – 
  * Senior Citizens preferential ROI benefit not available in Tender FD
  * Tender FD not allowed for colletral security / Lien purpose .


##### The Salient features of Tender FD are given as under:   
| Customers ( individual/ Non Individual ) looking for Fixed Deposit option for Participating in Bidding/ Tender Process.  |  
| --- |  
| Individuals, HUFs, Corporate, Trust, NGO, NRE/NRO and all other eligible Customers.  |  
 |  
| Additional Rate to Resident Senior Citizens and Staff/ Retired Staff Sr Citizen.  |

metadata.description: IDBI Bank being an organization committed towards green initiatives & promoting sustainable ecosystem for our future generation to come. In continuation to this noble concept we have introduced our latest financial product Vasundhara Green Deposit
